HEX_BEACON_01.short_description: The main entry checkpoint of Himalaya College of Engineering (HCOE) for HEX 2083.

detailed_info.about: The main entry checkpoint of Himalaya College of Engineering (HCOE) for HEX 2083. Welcome to the exhibition!

HEX_BEACON_02.short_description: The central hub for all visitors. Get your exhibition pass, dynamic layout codes, and guidelines here.

detailed_info.about: The central hub for all visitors. Managed by department clubs, this is where visitors register and download the HEXplore companion app.

showcases.title: Smart Siphon Spillway for Automated Water Level Management & Flood Mitigation
showcases.desc: An automated spillway design model by the Civil Department Club featuring real-time water level adjustments and smart flood mitigation mechanics.

showcases.title: Foundations for Civil Engineering Structures
showcases.desc: A structural showcase illustrating various heavy foundation techniques and earth reinforcement models.

showcases.title: Sustainable Rainwater Management for Resilient Cities
showcases.desc: A green infrastructure layout showing sustainable urban rainwater harvesting and permeable drainage models.

about_navigation.title: To the Right: Block B
about_navigation.desc: Walking right from the registration desk leads directly into Block B.

about_navigation.title: Straight Ahead: Basketball Court & Architecture Zone
about_navigation.desc: Continuing straight past the registration desk brings you directly to the outdoor Basketball Court and the Architecture Zone exhibition spaces.

HEX_BEACON_03.short_description: The central outdoor arena hosting active technological innovations and clubs from HECC, IT, and HRC.

detailed_info.about: The central outdoor arena hosting active technological innovations and clubs from HECC, IT, and HRC. Special Attraction Beyond Court: Robo Soccer Arena.

showcases.title: Virtual Lens Try-On Model with Dynamic Price Optimization
showcases.desc: HECC Club: Augmented reality lens fitting model utilizing custom neural networks for accurate face contouring alongside automated price adjustment algorithms.

showcases.title: AI-Assisted Real-Time Two-Player Quiz
showcases.desc: HECC Club: An interactive competitive game framework powered by AI to evaluate and serve custom engineering trivia live.

showcases.title: Portable Aero Drum Using FSR Technology
showcases.desc: HECC Club: Digital music synthesis system utilizing Force Sensitive Resistors (FSR) to enable air-drumming with sub-10ms response latency.

showcases.title: Smart Shopping Cart for Real-Time Billing & Checkout
showcases.desc: HECC Club: Embedded IoT cart using RFID scan tags and a local UI screen for instant itemized billing.

showcases.title: Smart Home Security System
showcases.desc: IT Club: Home security mesh integrating biometric locks, motion alarms, and real-time remote surveillance notifications.

showcases.title: IoT-Based Smart Irrigation System
showcases.desc: IT Club: Automated agricultural layout measuring soil moisture parameters to conserve water consumption via smart valves.

showcases.title: Bluetooth Remote-Controlled Car
showcases.desc: IT Club: Low-latency Arduino-powered vehicle operated via custom Android controller interface.

showcases.title: Remote-Controlled Balloon Popping Robot
showcases.desc: HRC Club: Custom-engineered robot chassis designed for balloon-popping arena matches under high torque controls.

showcases.title: Autonomous Line Following Robot
showcases.desc: HRC Club: Highly calibrated PID controlled vehicle navigating a complex black-line path with dynamic curves.

showcases.title: UAV Technology-Based Drone for Delivery, Surveying & Inspection
showcases.desc: HRC Club: Multi-rotor drone platform showcasing stable indoor navigation and aerial telemetry systems.

showcases.title: Computer Vision-Based Gesture-Controlled Robotic Arm
showcases.desc: HRC Club: Interactive industrial-grade arm prototype mimicking human hand gestures captured in real-time camera feeds.

games.title: Buzz Wire Challenge
games.desc: Test your nerve and hand stability by guiding the metal loop through a twisted copper track without triggering the alarm!

games.title: Ring Toss Bottle Game
games.desc: A traditional amusement stall challenge where you must throw rings precisely over the active light-up bottles.

games.title: Stop Time Precision Game
games.desc: Trigger the digital sensor exactly at 10.00 seconds. Win premium stickers for sub-millisecond precision!

about_navigation.title: Adjacent Side: Architecture Zone
about_navigation.desc: The Architecture Zone structural showcase models are located right along the side perimeter of the Basketball Court area.

about_navigation.title: Opposite Side: Robo Soccer Arena
about_navigation.desc: Walk past the main tech club setups to the other side of the court to find the active Robo Soccer Arena.

HEX_BEACON_04.short_description: Step into structural art. Explore advanced design scales, miniature physical blueprints, and creative structural setups.

detailed_info.about: Step into structural art. Explore advanced design scales, miniature physical blueprints, and creative structural setups curated by the Department of Architecture.

showcases.title: Architectural Design of a Residential Building
showcases.desc: Comprehensive modern residential building design featuring eco-sustainable ventilation and sunlight tracking parameters.

showcases.title: Architectural Design of a School Building
showcases.desc: A structural master plan of a smart educational campus focused on accessibility and community learning open zones.

games.title: Rat Trap Structural Strategy Game
games.desc: A layout-building logic board game where you must block the opponent's pieces using tactical walls.

games.title: Face Paint Creative Zone
games.desc: Get your face painted with traditional structural themes or tech glow designs by architecture students!

about_navigation.title: Behind the Zone: Block B
about_navigation.desc: Block B is situated directly behind the Architecture Zone exhibition area.

about_navigation.title: Adjacent Side: Basketball Court & Tech Club Zone
about_navigation.desc: The central Basketball Court housing the active IT, Robotics, and Electronics club stalls is located directly to the side of the Architecture Zone.
